## Quote Style
- **89% Prefers double quotes** (17/19 files)

## Type Hints
- **89% Uses type hints (17 files)** (17/19 files)

## Trailing Commas
- **68% Uses trailing commas in collections and function args (13 files)** (13/19 files)
  - Examples: `80 trailing commas found`, `8 trailing commas found`, `73 trailing commas found`

## Formatters & Linters
- **ruff** -- configured in pyproject.toml [tool.ruff]
  - line-length: 100
  - select: E, F, W, I, N, UP, B, SIM, RUF
  - target-version: py311
- **mypy** -- configured in pyproject.toml [tool.mypy]
  - python_version: 3.11
  - strict: true
